name: Injured borrower || Lucian
description:
You find a traumatized, half conscious, reasonably pissy borrower in some dirty alleyway while you’re on a walk. He’s not in a very good mood, not having a very good day 😔

I like how he came out, took me like 40 minutes though so he could tweak out but thats the fun of it
